creator: sargeo@bmi.net
text:
This is a companion port in support of my jgnat-1.1p port (once it's
survived
	it's teething pains).  In common with my gnat-doc-* ports, the
jgnat-doc-html
	port is the master port, with several slave ports in other formats.

	Because I'm having reverse-DNS problems beyond my immediate means to
remedy
	(read, my ISP has head-space-and-timing problems), I would ask that any
feedback
	be CC'ed to john_m_cooper@yahoo.com and
jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net--otherwise, I may
	not get a word your writing.  Thanks :).

Fix: Once again, the hated shar archive:
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
